title: negretia urens
intro: Negretia urens, also known as fireweed, is a perennial herb with a woody base and a branched stem. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Negretia urens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
